Yvon and Cody are professional, knowledgeable, and personable. They communicated clearly and consistently throughout the project, ensuring I felt informed every step of the way. Cody provided daily progress updates, complete with photographs, which I greatly appreciated. They were always available to answer my questions and address any concerns promptly.

Their installation team was equally impressive — hardworking, courteous, and highly professional. They cleaned the yard thoroughly at the end of each day, and it was clear that every member of the team took genuine pride in their workmanship.

Chris Matus","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bill Brass","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVempNwTFfOjgebFoKAlJbvzL13_K2ZJdduZr1531HhwzzzGzE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After seeing several advertisements for Valley Metal Roofing, we decided to given them a call and get a quote. They were here for less than 30 min and said that the flashing was leaking on the top left hand corner. They put some patch on it and was done. The next day it started to rain and I still noticed water staining my ceiling from the inside so I called them back.They came back the next day and did another patch along the side of the skylight. Then it started to rain again the next day and the leak was getting worse. I tried calling them back and this time they did not answer my text or calls. The leak was getting worse by the hour so I found Allstar roofing and called them on a weekend. Alven the owner of the company answered my call and explained that they can come out to tarp off the skylight for a fee and that they can schedule the repairs on a sunny day. Alven came out on his own within the hour and tarped over the skylight. He came back on a sunny day with his worker and found that the flashing around the skylight needed to be resealed as it was lifting in several areas. He resealed the whole flashing around the skylight and also replaced the skylight as the old skylight was showing a lot of wear around the frame. Alven and his worker did an excellent job and also patched a few areas of the roof where he found might be a problem if it was left alone. I would definitely recommend this company as they are honest and pricing was pretty fair. Good Job guys !!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCw44yUEg&fid=0x0:0x7ed9badca9583830"],"When":"2025-3-20"},{"Name":"Keith Blackmore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJE_2Pj6DVqF3aPhCY9Cz0YGzuBeNteEFYJ0Fjg39EuEXSgPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"WE recently had All Star replace an old roof with a new one. They did a great job and I would highly recommend them!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carl Lum","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSRGuPwov4aPPoD_HaL4gsNcSZ8Vex25vT77JrFGm3yqyxX-d5KA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I chose Cooper Roofing because they impressed us with detailed estimates, helpful staff, and top notch professionalism. Sebastian did a great job of describing the work and made us feel reassured. Their workers were quick and friendly, and Volkan was very knowledgeable and helpful.

When the job was done, the final inspection report was detailed and provided lots of photos and overhead drone shots. We are satisfied that we have a quality roof that'll last many years (if not the rest of our lives). I will add that Cooper was actually the highest price of all our estimates, but we still feel we got good value for the money.

One caveat though: Cooper takes no responsibility for interior damage and they state that right in their contract. We had our skylight replaced and the new skylight removed the old interior trimming, leaving some bare wood and gaps exposed. When we asked Cooper if they could add a decorative strip to cover these gaps, we were surprised that they told us to go find a drywall contractor to finish the job! This after the thousands of $$$ of business we gave them. We also received conflicting reasons why they didn't include the trim.

However after some negotiating, we arrived at a solution satisfactory to both parties, even though it wasn't 100% what we expected. But it's close enough and we consider the matter closed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCV_5KG4snnrIdN3kfkcGVa&fid=0x0:0xa74891fa06dda3dc"],"When":"2025-7-31"},{"Name":"Bryan Belyk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0p6Op7LtCSv-33GqzYdIEYArRUBAZg9qQRpFJgFZLsP1zTqhJNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently hired Cooper’s Roofing for a fascia repair on our mixed residential/commercial building, and we couldn't be happier with the results. He gave me a quote, came back as agreed. The roof was fixed, flattened and new drain was added. I am happy with the work and the cost was reasonable. They fixed what was needed and it was done in a timely manner. I will be looking for them to do regular inspections in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ming Soo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzaIrU_br8_HyZdTNVVMSGS1KvPF83kuRUSm8G0eyjyBPj-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"About one year ago, GVRD replaced my house’s touch-on roof which is still under a 12-year warranty. In late October (2018), a piece of fascia board around the chimney fell off from the roof. I called Chris, the owner of GVRD Roofing, with my cellphone a couple times but no call was returned. Then I sent him a couple of SMSs and followed up with an email with a picture of the fallen fascia board a week later, and again there was no reply from him. I then called him from my land phone with its number blocked at the receiving end, and this time Chris answered my call and thought I was a new customer. I told him the problem, and he said that he would send someone to fix it next Monday.
I sent him a reminder in the following Monday morning. I waited all day but no one from GVRD showed up. Due to the heavy raining was coming next day, I had to use whatever glue I have in my garage to attach the fallen fascia board back to the roof in that late afternoon. Afterward, I asked him to send someone to examine/fix the problem properly a few times, and finally he sent me a message that he would send someone to fix the problem. However, no one showed up again.
I sent the last request to Chris on February 1st, 2019 and mentioned that if he doesn’t send his guy to fix the problem, I will write a review about this complain. No message returned from him before I post this review.
If he doesn’t want to fix something broken within a year, what is a 12-year warranty for?

(18 Mar 2019) Comments on Chris' response:

1. I received no message from you either from my answering machine, SMS or email. Shouldn't you let me know which date and what time your team member came when I was not home?

2. In a professional manner, isn't it a courtesy to inform your customer before going to his house so he will be there to wait for you?

3. Is this the way you deal with your customers for warranty/after-service works by communicating through Google Reviews?

4. Because the sheet metal was not done properly the first time, that was why it fell down. Under warranty, it should be repaired in the way you installed it before and you should not charge for the repair. Period.

(24 April 2019) Two weeks ago, finally someone from GVRD came to resolve the problem. The roofer spent about 5 minutes to inspect the problem and applied proper sealant along the gap between the chimney and the sheet metal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC49Zqpbg&fid=0x0:0x89aefde1fa01e25b"],"When":"2019-2-19"},{"Name":"Audrey Ple","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVn2viesIOzi9dZ9nbe1o9PIANNzO6j3rX9MsPlM8PokqyCmzh7aA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"2022: When I noticed a leak in my bedroom, I contact many roofers. Most did not get back to me. A few told me they were so busy, they had to turn customers away. GVRD Roofing stayed in touch with me and sent Marcos as soon as he had a spare moment. The repair took only 10 minutes, but I am so grateful to have it done. Marcos also said if I have any further problems, to just let him know. It was an overall excellent experience given the very difficult time we are having in BC right now with excessive rain and storms. I recommend GVRD Roofing Inc and thank the team for taking care of my roof.

2024: Because of the great service I got in 2022, when my roof leaked again this year, I contacted GVRD. Another amazing job. Roof leak is repaired and at the same time, the team replaced some broken vent and plumbing stacks and cleaned the moss from the roof for a very fair price. I hope my roof will hold out for another ten years. Thank you. I highly recommend GVRD Roofing Inc.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kyle Erickson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpptr7nPYPPFk51OnQLvxP70onhM272AbvQ9GITiFEUAPoY5NtAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Called them to repair an emergency leak in the upstairs bathroom roof. I explained the situation and was quoted 'a couple hundred'.  They sent someone over within a couple hours (this was the weekend too, I was impressed).

The guy came, took a look, found the hole in the roof (and 2 others), and told me he could seal them. I asked if he could also tarp one of the areas as well. He said he could, though he didn't think it was necessary. I asked him what the cost would be, and he said '5 or 6 hundred, though I'm not really the pricing guy so I don't know'. I mentioned the original guy we spoke to thought it would be a couple hundred but the guy on-site explained since it's more work than they thought so it would be more.

I agreed, and he did the work (and covered one of the areas with a tarp I bought). He left after less than 2 hours.

The next day I got an invoice for $1200, with no line items for what labour cost, materials, anything. Just $1200 and a couple lines of descriptors.

I called to ask about the massive discrepancy and he said 'oh, that what the on-site guy said to charge... I guess I'll talk to him again' which didn't instill confidence in me. He sent a revised invoice for $750 a little later.

I'm glad it's not $1200 but I would encourage anyone working with GVRD Roofing to get a quote in writing, and also sign off on work to be done with a quoted amount.

To be clear, the roofing work seems fine (and I'm glad they were able to come so quickly), it's just the quoting and invoicing that I have a problem with. Paying 3.5 times the amount quoted over the phone, and still more than the on-site guy's estimate doesn't feel great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"KS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtKmg2d7VY1fg4qgOYMXm8c1Sm9A2nK6P09OWCMjWauDiPSbQxag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a missing vent cap cover on my roof that needed to be installed ASAP. Called them on a Sat, Dan showed up at the time he said he would Sunday morning. However I had not received a quote so there was some back and forth with Dan and his boss - they ended up quoting me something competitive to another quote I had received so I went ahead with having Dan proceed to add a new vent cap cover. While on the roof Dan identified my deteriorating roof caps and suggested I replace them soon to make the roof last longer. As well he helped me secure down other vent caps to avoid having them get dislodged. Overall Dan was professional and a good communicator.  There was some mix up with the invoice afterwards with his boss Chris but it was quickly resolved and I am happy with their help last minute on a weekend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Athena Affan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjXsPuRi1sb0jy0PJsygOjvpMXmO2J_yu4Flo3mbsnahkLGFS2Hg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you so much Chris for helping us address a persistent leak! GVRD Roofing was quick to respond to my call and got someone out to take a look and assess the problem the same day. They sent us pictures showing where they felt the issue was and communicated the work that they anticipated needed to be done. They did a quick fix right away to stop the leak with a plan to come back to do a more fullsome repair later.

When the fix wasn't sufficient, I called Chris who sent his team back to take another look and complete the work.  Initially we were not satisfied with the work that was done, because the issue was not resolved. I got in touch with Chris who took our concernse seriously and sent his team out one last time with really experienced roofers, and the assurance that they'd do the absolute best they could. It paid off, and now - no more leak!

Chris is dedicated to providing quality work, and is flexible and easy to work with. I highly recommend GVRD Roofing for fast and reliable roofing needs.

Thanks!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Burrowes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQDp0weGABv_yTyNgbFKVXRyWEQOVpweKl531fnrSrhQGbEA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"GVRD Roofing did a great job on our commercial building. Guys were fantastic 7am starts and late days. So professional and very high quality. Not one of our tenants complained about noise or smell. I would highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""}]

For a more detailed 5-star review, please read Barbra's comments on the Better Business Bureau Vancouver website.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Peter Ostafichuk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqNW2IY6OocOG3rO5dPyqJdHtZpqbEBY0jhB-vusxh_xX2sac=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough good things about Reg Norton.  To begin with, he does not cut corners or compromise on quality, and he always makes sure that anything he works on is done well and to last.  This includes when he finds mistakes by other contractors (which he often fixes and doesn't charge for!).  Reg has taken on a number of projects for me including cutting back a roof line; installing new fascia boards; rebuilding a brick chimney (both above the roof and in the attic); installing liners for new tankless water heaters; and repairing holes in a chimney and wall from the replacement of water heaters.  Every one of these jobs was done to a high quality and Reg walked me through what he was doing and why at each step.  His prices are more than fair--when I first started with Reg it seemed like he was charging slightly more than others, but I quickly learned that this is because he is upfront about costs and doesn't trick you with hidden costs later, his work is more complete than others so he does the full job at high quality, and he doesn't leave you with loose ends or a partially finished job.  Having now worked with a bunch of contractors on my house, Reg's work is by far the best value I have seen.  Where other contractors try to minimize their time on site so they can move on to the next job, Reg will spend an extra day or two (without charge) to do things right.  More than anything, he is an honest and decent guy that I trust to do good work.  I'm already scheduling him to come back in the spring take on a few more projects.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wil Mak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-X8dHVhluaV289slNHzbzVXMOt47UFuc-SjNy6RJU6tO6snQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Reg is multi-talented since he was able to fix our chimney, roof, and gutter. [{"Name":"Leat Ahrony","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXthu4MEAIvH8oEQ9AsM1KpfAXslWLYMKQeeM5yOeiL_q8_YUY-2w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent service! Our roof was leaking and it was near the end of life. They were very professional with the consultation, and always great with communication. Then they chose a sunny week to do my roof and it was awesome . Love the work. Left the work site clean. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kathleen Maslin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLNwzOn6Nugm0f94s_cKbEcXaxzpndl0x8GNXRWQuLrmAJfvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I called Alpha Nova roofing, because of their wonderful google reviews. I left a voicemail & got a call back very quickly. After explaining our water issues, she said she would have someone call to discuss if they could help us. That same day, Youssef called & spoke with my husband. He said he would need to come out & take a look. Youssef came last Friday…went up on the roof & found the main problem as well as some problem areas. When I asked when they could come back to fix it, he said they would make the job a priority and call me this week to fit us in their schedule … hopefully in the next 2 weeks. Sunday night ( 2 days later) Youssef texted asking if they could come the holiday Monday (today) to get the roof fixed, and they did!! Youssef came himself, and brought a partner…and they worked all afternoon. From their quick response times to their communication style, we were very impressed. He explained everything, taking videos & pictures so we could see the problem before & after. Their customer service is excellent. I highly recommend Youssef & Alpha Nova Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"nikki lule","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmgTezgnHcOC9Lo-GS7UYiXi4fo246edOoDmyyQ2OMCFgNmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent company!!! We recently had our roof done by Youssef, Badr and team and they went above and beyond!  They came by to check out the roof and explained what they observed and went over the cost, timeline, brand etc. and they stuck to it!  They are very personable and professional, told us what they think and no pressure into purchasing.  I honestly didn’t think that you would be able to see a difference in a roof but it looks beautiful! I highly recommend using them, a great, kind, fast, hardworking team!  They even cleaned out our gutters and made sure there was no moisture in the attic! Thank you so much Alpha Nova!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOFqtzHpvHvz70Y0xELagx&fid=0x0:0x9f5ccae56d2f9bd4"],"When":"2025-6-13"},{"Name":"IgnitePennywisdom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2AeEIFeywaFCkzv1eNbQAw-iQXyYbXQ7wlEX2SG4Fmqt5kZ0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely fantastic company, all the way from ownership, down to management, and to the tradesmen themselves. Perfect communication, everything was on time, incredibly informative quote system, a perfect experience from beginning to end. And I never ever thought I would say that about a roofing company in my life. These guys are top notch, and you cannot go wrong using them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Corey Marchant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXy2oZsQUyieA10BKex_jCfWzSAh-OgXesl1p0A2EHjFAxjGBk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had AlphaNova Roofing come in and do a quote on replacing our roof as we had some leaks from the old roof and it had reached the end of its life.

There was a bit of an error with the initial quote as the address we supplied did not show our actual house with the Sat images they use for estimating the quote. Once they arrived they were able to give a quote for our actual place very quickly on the spot and we didn't have to wait any additional time. Ibrahim's ability to adjust on the fly is amazing. Ibrahim was apologetic, though it was due to no fault of his own. We were given a few different options and settled on the best one for us. Price was on point and covered not only the new roof, but brand new gutters as well.

The work was started by Ibrahim's crew quickly after the deposit was paid. The work was done safely and professionally. The crew were courteous and polite, and they kept the mess from roofing down to a minimum. I couldn't be more happier with the stellar work that was performed.

I would have no problems recommending AlphaNova Roofing to anyone for their roofing needs","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICrgLGafA&fid=0x0:0x9f5ccae56d2f9bd4"],"When":"2024-7-2"},{"Name":"Kasun de Silva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhTiJQ8WN1W8Cyf_2oWMGnYUGQI6D-qcZUWVx9yXBKZdD8xQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I contacted AlphaNova roofing about a roof leak I had. The team showed up earlier than the scheduled time. They were both very professional and courteous in locating the roof leak. I was also given multiple quotes at my request for different repair options. The scheduled roof repair was done within the time promised an at the quoted price. I was also provided with repair pictures. I can say that I’m extremely happy with the service AlphaNova provided. I will definitely be using them for all my roofing needs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC957X5lQE&fid=0x0:0x9f5ccae56d2f9bd4"],"When":"2024-3-10"},{"Name":"Jon Macfarlane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJWkUUtLC8YDZzQqsqc2MzOFd2XK_udc13AJboRN_ijsgSoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Alphanova Roofing was fantastic. We recently had our roof and fascia replaced. We were blown away by the outstanding service. All the employees with this company are amazing!! Making the decision to contract with Alphanova was easy given their superb customer service. Youssef and Ibrahim really go above and beyond making sure that you understand and feel comfortable with the decision and really take the time to explain the process and all options available. Overall, we were impressed with everything they did. Definitely recommend Alphanova Roofing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDL7ImYHA&fid=0x0:0x9f5ccae56d2f9bd4"],"When":"2024-6-26"},{"Name":"Vic Mina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZa4IcbztlhoSgWvnH4Z4WdFQi8z-6f4sr6Yu3OZfmjgYjOZyg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Alphanova roofing is a professional Team. They work fast, clean, and sticks to the work details in the contract. I admire young people who keeps the level of work ethics these guys displayed in doing their job. Well done. More power to your company. Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOHlvY-mi-aOJw&fid=0x0:0x9f5ccae56d2f9bd4"],"When":"2025-5-18"}]

The finished product was great and they cleaned up well after finishing. I’m really happy with the end result. I recommend these folks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5NQl7LQPLAaqGKFJoOTdQ&fid=0x0:0x5ffc86243f4a9e58"],"When":"2026-2-21"},{"Name":"David Birnie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocINvbKJ-RDcd0zbIVeZcGycsZwLcNWkg5vSVC7rLx_U9J1Bag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience working with Penfolds Roofing & Solar on our solar installation. Communication, installation and speed from start to finish was great - the team was professional, organized and experienced.  We've been generating clean energy for 2 years now and are very happy with the service from Penfolds.  If you're considering solar, I would recommend Penfolds - fast, professional, fair pricing and excellent work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve Campbell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3DlYUOzq9EBfVe9b1LuXWukIv5UrZJ7l8yc4grL72ce_Agg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Penfolds are the best. We had them install our new roof and gutters. They were extremely professional and did a great job. I cannot recommend them enough !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBQhAZLxqfO47RBuvb-Kxwy3vjCiYzAiASL4PJJ6exTX1_uA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Had our roof replaced by Penfolds 15 yrs ago, with a 30 year warranty on materials and 10 years on workmanship.   After leaks through our ceiling in multiple areas, I went into the attic only to discover that the plywood was black and completely soaked. Penfolds insisted that we pay $350 to come and check it, even though I was a previous customer and their website indicates free estimates.  Other companies offered no cost for this and we chose to go elsewhere.  It turned out that the ridge vent Penfolds installed was not cut properly nor did they provide adequate ventilation for the roof to perform as it should have.  I do not recommend this company for your roof replacement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexandra Marinets","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzO94OgnfthBc748vVw_7H5FZXXBqrvbZr_qZHMPx-792ZttxM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We did our roof last year with Penfolds after our neighbours suggested the company. I start with the fact that our previous roof guaranteed 25 years was leaking big time after 15 and we needed to also replace some of the plywood. Penfolds manager did an estimate and was really pretty much correct. The job was completed efficiently and a year later no problems and it rained a lot. Our manager was Andrew Cameron.  I wanted to thank Andrew Cameron specifically for always being there when I had questions. Maybe I had too many, I don't know, but I felt he was very responsive and always very informative. Thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4ktWpFQ&fid=0x0:0x5ffc86243f4a9e58"],"When":"2019-5-17"},{"Name":"Craig Cope","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmyzDrT7JGKHx3t_ostPdDx42cNkEzJPDts35fZPIaAfcoQw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They executed the scope of work with high service standards and expert knowledge! Hats off to Mathew Barlett (Technical Advisor) and Cory (Installer) Cory was very knowledgeable helped explain roofing code for the air vents as well added assistants for access to AC contractor.  Mathew provided great coordination and scheduling! Was most impressed that he even provided the names of the team that was going to be onsite. Great team to work and would recommend penfolds services again!

Rhino","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcuqq9cQ&fid=0x0:0x5ffc86243f4a9e58"],"When":"2019-12-30"},{"Name":"Flora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMIPYN-yEPOf8h19XjiLx1vtbvrC3KiqcA4X4J4CPp9bJhnA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolute HORRIBLE service! They told us they’d get it done quickly, but that was a lie. It was only after four months they told us they needed to inspect the material and have to order it. Why they didn’t look at the material four months ago when they assessed the scope of work & when they viewed the roof, I don’t know. [{"Name":"Malika Lim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgkQeTCo5VKa9y2SWUmBEPDjs5uAcJUoFLIo2ICh98DxtMxzOpJw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The folks here were super helpful, we wanted three walls painted with two different colours and we wanted the grout in our main shower to be replaced. They sent two technicians who picked up the exact colours we liked (we could have done it ourselves for a cheaper price but they did leave the materials with us since we paid for them. note that if you do this you pay for both the materials and a $80 travel fee).

The colours turned out beautifully and they did an awesome job ensuring paint didn't get anywhere it wasn't supposed to. They also confirmed with me before unplugging any electronics in the room and patched some holes in the wall.

the whole service was $1,342.06 after materials, taxes, and labour. Could you find a cheaper service, probably. But the service that was provided was wonderful and they provided a rough invoice (except for material cost which can't be predicted) ahead of time so I knew what I was in for. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Alex Castaneda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5rT_E7NP7uB4bjOzNQej-EZMvKshQki8Q8tY4OkiAVy2g8ZVo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"People always question great reviews given to any company that provides services. Naturally we all wonder if they are by legit costumers writing those comments; are they being honest and accurate. I own a house in Hasting-Sunrise neibourhood in East Vancouver. The most important part of any house is without a doubt the roof. It protects your family and belonging from the ever changing west coast weather and it's because of that we should do our diligent work when choosing the right people that we are trusting to keep our home protected from mother nature's harsh elements. I called 3 different companies to get a quote and I quickly settled with this one. When I first met John and Paul, I immediately felt at ease with them; we went up on the roof and they inspected all areas (including the gutters) and they took proper measurements in order to provide an accurate quote and not just something pulled out of a hat. They'd explained me in detail what the work process was going to be and provided me with a timeline; they listed the types of materials they were using and offered solutions with different budget options. All of their work was conducted in a clean and respectful manner without impacting the environment around our garden. They cover and protected all the areas around the house that could have been impacted when removing the old roof. They also installed new venting outlets to improve the air circulation of the attic at no extra cost. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Johnny yoga Yoga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpdbfQM8f1bxdNUXvEEu2spb5_EzDmejjB8XEaRW3CN6LwCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My realtor gave me heritages number after
I had two roofing companies out to check for a leak I had only during heavy rain ,they tried to fix but leak continued they said I needed a new roof
When I called John he looked at it on google maps and told me that it was most lightly the crown was broken and the bricks on my chimney were not sealed ie waterproofed ,but he would come by and do an inspection the next day .
After the inspection He showed me photographs and videos of the broken crown and also photographs of a couple of spots on the roof that were damaged and worn and gave me a price to fix chimney and roof .
The leak has now gone I have pictures and videos of all the work done
And he guaranteed all his work not to leak .
John has a lot of experience over 30  years
I’m glad I picked heritage","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDg18zOiwE&fid=0x0:0x8555e8aaed09089"],"When":"2025-2-28"},{"Name":"Stephen Smyth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkxu_BJUt765Uwn1S0Q3tjz0vnJY8XDxq9M24sJ6ycZUtcpRo8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My landlord had a leaky chimney around Christmas this year, and I reached out to
“HERITAGE CHIMNEY and ROOF”
they were able to come out that same evening. They took pictures and videos, showing me the hole in the roof and the issue with the flashing around the chimney. They were able to provide a temporary fix that stopped the leak right away. Two weeks later, they returned to fully restore the chimney. My landlord was especially impressed with their 20-year leak-free guarantee on all the work. I highly recommend Heritage Chimney for their prompt service and reliable work!"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ron Goodman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJdgTW3H4ck42xfMoBVABVp8U9uw7Pz53fIOVZ8lobYwPamJg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a lot of dampness at the bottom of my chimney. I had two or three chimney companies come and look at it. They said they could rebuild the chimney, Above the roof, but they couldn’t do anything for the dampness below the roof at the bottom of the chimney near the ground.
.When Michael, from Heritage came out he had a moisture meter, and tested the moisture at the bottom of the chimney it was between 40 and 60% which they said was a lot .they were able to fix it by bringing in a gas construction  heater and heating the bottom of the chimney and heating the brick until the moisture was gone.  then applying two to three coats of sealer which waterproofed the brick then they put an elastomeric coating  over the bottom of the chimney and restoring the chimney above the roof, repointing it, and sealing the brick
None of the other companies even suggested that
Now there’s no moisture in the break at all the chimney above the roof is totally restored and not leaking any water, and they also repointed and waterproofed the chimney at the back of the house  all for a good price.
heritage went  more than beyond any of the other companies  and not only that they guarantee it for 20 years, so I’m very happy that I called Heritage there a great team","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Mills","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2VV-PwbAKvd37Dj9fBzgH4rQ7uK85h-O0NO9bMkDHdpMmvjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great team and did a bang up for us. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Joe Yeung Wai Chui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_KRunk9AiLiL1s3eFVboH0veN8HcPHzhwWlZLgx_zthUfDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was approached by Griffin as a walk by a few months back, I’ve been thinking of updating my roof around the time, so it was perfect opportunity to get a quote from him, in turn he was very knowledgeable and up front, no hidden cost, plus he can guide u to a finance company with low interest if u can’t pay it all at once (we end up didn’t need it, but it was a good option to have)

We scheduled a date, but when it got close the weather wasn’t very stable he was willing to rescheduled to tend to my concern, which I was very appreciated and finally when May comes weather seen to be mush better and we are ready! But he had to push us back a couple of days, which in turn I totally understood.
Anyway, the big dumpster got dropped off, the guy was very nice and gentle that he put wood plank underneath it so it wouldn’t mark my driveway, and the undoing of my old roof began!!! The guys was very efficient and careful, they even got the water barrier down the first day, second day was a little slow, but they did manage to get more than half done and most of the vents changed, third day was finishing up the shingles and clean up most of the big debris around the house.
On the fourth day it was the new gutters, they did take some time, but it was done just as the sun went down(without the down pipes)
Finally on the fifth day, all the down pipes are connected a little touch up here and there, with the garbage bin hauled away and Griffin did a walk around on the roof with me!

My final thoughts, their installation was very nice, all the flashing and end piece was well placed, exposed nails(for the vents) was sealed with sealer/silicone, my only little little feed back to Griffin was about the final clean up(because that was the sales pitch that got me to go with him) might need a little bit effort, but all in all I am very happy","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKn7yO-f2qyizgE&fid=0x0:0xe96df3497cf8748c"],"When":"2025-5-11"},{"Name":"Amandah Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7vj6hIs1gDSgBT53rsY2onXYmJBGVm8ShVulIHTRFAWWJkF8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rydel did an incredible job putting the Christmas light on our house! It looks simply magical and my kids love running out to look at the light every night. We are very grateful!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDOjacuH-NnYT39QyOej2J1&fid=0x0:0xe96df3497cf8748c"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Susan Allen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7-QAXc0WAz8Ox27ga_XQJEE8L9NIqYfk4k9V49TqAGNINuaCK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From start to finish we were very happy with the service from the Rydel team. Great communication through the whole project.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bernie Hadley-Beauregard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpxmsYqz3VqQWDSnyBN22EmWRLtHmu9SKfqJ6KWImRYyOL1IE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had an outstanding re-roofing experience with Rydel Roofing. He was professional, knowledgeable & courteous and responded quickly to our emails and answered all questions & concerns we had.

Griffin took the time to show us the options for repairing vs. replacing our roof.  The detailed inspection report with photos identifying the condition of our roof was extremely helpful and the quote was transparent with a very competitive price. We decided to go with the repair and was not disappointed.

The work was completed within 2 days and included all recommended repairs, preventative maintenance & cleaning.  The final inspection report contained a summary with a set of photos clearly showing the work completed.

I was not present during the installation of the new roof but when there were issues after the installation, they were quick to come and deal with it.  They honoured their warranty without any run around.  They were excellent communicators and very good to work with.  I will use them again in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robby V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsYfdjmXmS8OQe1eHE88erhqf3c4Taot6IM0bkrRdN-24mCw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After getting quotes from four different companies, we decided to go with Canuck Roofing.  Our decision was based on the positive Google reviews, The Best of Burnaby Awards, A+ BBB rating, and competitive price.  Our first point of contact was with Garrett.  He provided a thorough walk through and explained the scope of work required.  By the end of the day, I had a copy of a very detailed quote that included the scope of work to be done, including all the details of the type of shingles to be applied, vents, flashing, finishes, warranty, etc…

The start of the job was delayed by a few weeks due to rain.  The crew arrived at 7am on the day the job started.  They laid out tarps around the perimeter of the property to protect the plants and walkway.  By noon, the entire roof had been stripped off and they started applying new plywood.  There was a threat of rain that evening so they knew they had to have the roof waterproofed before they left that day.  The crew was fast and efficient and put in a long 12 hour day.  They made sure to leave the yard clean and free of debris before they left for the day.

On Day 2 we met with Arnell and project manager Franscisco.  They went over the progress and addressed any concerns that we had.  As a contractor myself, I was very impressed with the quality of work and attention to detail that the crew took.  Every row of shingles were perfectly straight and they chalk lined all the valleys and cap shingles.  They even installed rain diverters at all the edges to direct the rain towards the gutters.  They took the extra step of respraying the furnace vent and chimney flashing.  You could tell the crew took pride in their work.

After everything was completed on the roof, the crew cleaned the entire perimeter of the house.  They blew out all the gutters and picked up every last bit of debris from the flower beds.  Before they left, they used a magnet roller to pickup any nails from the driveway.  I cannot say enough about the professionalism of the crew and the quality of their work.  The project manager Franscisco came by to do a final walkthrough to ensure that everything was completed, and to our satisfaction, before accepting our final payment.  If you need your roof redone, I highly recommend Canuck Roofing.  Excellent job!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAcUdcd3VMLfhSRMQkE47ZP&fid=0x0:0xd33de2d70a59d9b2"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Min-Jee Mowat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8uCA1U3usW8xUu0mhvaDVOx-f71LysE8W5-YPMoH6nVtUsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was able to communicate and dispatch a crew to us within less than an hour of finding a huge hole in our roof. Scottie on the other had was extremely quick to respond, assessed the work based on the photos I had, and give me a quote on the spot and even though it was considered a pretty small job, scheduled the work for that week.  The work was completed flawlessly and the guys on the work crew were even up front about the shingles potentially not matching despite their best efforts to procure the best match. I would definitely recommend Scottie and his team for their friendliness, professionalism, and quick turnaround.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Colin Lancaster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeQbh8jaTlnPREhz9lpOiK2q_KdzDoHY2h7N5v-eREMXRX4O0Q-w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Canuck Roofing replaced our cedar shingle roof with an asphalt IKO shingle roof. They started with an emergency visit before Christmas, sealing up a leak with a temporary tarp, and then they came back as soon as the snow cleared and did the job start to finish.  They did a complete job, scaling off the rotten tiles, catching them on tarps and stowing them in a bin. Then a layer of plywood, a layer of black waterproofing paper and the top layer of asphalt tiles. The crew was headed up by the owner, son of the founder who did our first roof. Coming to an end of the first winter with it and it has relieved so much stress. The old cedar roof took me days of back breaking labour to clean (we have two massive trees that drop debris onto our roof), while this roof sheds debris so easily. 3 days is now down to a quick 20 min job with a leaf blower.
The roof looks fantastic and many neighbours have commented on how good it looks!

It was genuinely one of the best interactions we’ve ever had with any contractor!

From day one, the Penfolds team walked us through exactly what to expect, answered every question, and gave us total confidence in the process. They stuck to their timelines, honoured their quote, and went above and beyond in terms of communication. They even took the time to chat with me while I was being a bit nosy and curious about the work, which I really appreciated.

I called to request an inspection of both the roof and attic, and from the very first interaction, the experience was excellent. The person who answered the phone was friendly, listened carefully to my concerns, and was able to schedule an appointment the very same day. I also appreciated receiving an upfront estimate before any work began.

Will and his assistant arrived right on time and were both professional and courteous. They took great care inside the house, making sure carpets stayed clean and placing rags before entering the attic. They thoroughly inspected the attic, took photos, and clearly explained their findings. Thankfully, there was no issue with the roof, which was very reassuring.

What really impressed me was that they went above and beyond the scope of the roof inspection. Instead of stopping there, they investigated further and discovered the true source of the moisture — an HVAC pipe that wasn’t properly sealed to the diffuser. They could have simply said the roof was fine and left it at that, but they took the extra step to find the real cause.

I was extremely impressed with their honesty, professionalism, and attention to detail. Highly recommend this company!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Wallace MacKay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXi0gLdsP6SQdWEGFytwUu-l4jWVL0gsHnGlVFQdkMDMolU8T34=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kizi Melo (an Absolute Roof Solutions technican) restored 2 decks, both getting older and weathered, in our Kitsilano duplex. [{"Name":"Eoin Brennan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuU7yPDhqTm-J2ZD9jnjMTr8PkrfzMm_qakEf93l7W7DPjEGB8pw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top quality craftsmanship by an friendly and competent team.

The affect a new roof has on the curb appeal of your house is enormous, not to mention the comfort you gain knowing that everything is watertight for the oncoming winter - you need the installation done right.   Doug, Rada and team were awesome from beginning to end - from clear details of what was being installed in the quote to how they protected the rest of the house and deck during demolition and installation - they went the extra mile.

They easily dealt with some curveballs we threw to them too. They removed our leaky (and now unused) chimneys above the roofline, giving the home a much cleaner look and installed snow guards.

Doug took time to work through a water egress issue that was not related to the roof installation - including helping me cut drywall open! - determined to find a solution the issue. Which we did.
We also required some more specialized carpentry work. Doug leveraged his own network to get us somebody to complete it.

It's not easy to find a company that that you can trust with such competitive pricing and such high quality craftsmanship on such a project. I feel fortunate to have worked with Doug, Rada and the team at Eco Exteriors.

The metal roof has really given the home a transformative look. And the new gutters were really the cherry on top. My photographs attached don't truly show how transformative it is.

We were re-roofing my senior mom's home and they were very understanding to how the commotion may upset her. The workers were extremely respectful and polite when dealing with my mom. The yard was cleaned and all the debris was removed. The workmanship was excellent. We are very pleased with the quality and service provided by Kerrisdale Roofing. I would definitely recommend Kerrisdale Roofing. Thank you Tim and Kim for for a job well done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rick Leung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8oA_oHN9_jWQMRm3QL-ihUsWQ-n6CmDWR4oEw5hk4uK6p-103aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tim and his crew at Kerrisdale Roofing have been phenomenal in helping me replace my asphalt shingles roof.

The disastrous atmospheric river event in Nov (2021) revealed a leaky roof at my place. After multiple failed attempts to temporarily patch it up myself, I figured I might as well bite the bullet and go for the nuclear option of replacing the entire roof -- the shingles only, obviously.

From the moment when I first called, Tim has always been open and upfront about everything. He was initially uncertain of when he'd be able to fit my job into his schedule because of the ones he already has on hand, but he promised to get back to me, and he did. He was down-to-earth and had my interests in mind when he came for the estimate. Instead of recommending something that was fancy (and probably could have gotten him a nicer profit), he offered a recommendation that was practical while being more economical. He took the time to explain to me the features and qualities of the roof that I would be getting, and he even recommended a colour that turned out to work much better with the rest of my house instead of the plain, simple black that I had in mind.

When the time came to actually install the roof, his crew was professional, friendly, and obviously cared about the quality of their work. They took the time to explain to me what was wrong with my previous roof shingles installation, and how their installation would specifically avoid those pitfalls. They were efficient with their work. They were spot on with their estimate on how long the job would take. And they did a good clean up of everything around the house when the project was finished.

During the removal of the old shingles, the crew discovered that parts of my chimney and the associated flashings were in such a shape that they should really be repaired. Despite their observations and recommendations, they were never pushy about making me hire them for the additional repair work. Still, I was glad to have them help me with it, and they readily arranged to have their mason come for this at a later date.

I am obviously not a roofing expert by any means, but I find the workmanship and attention to detail of both the roofing job as well as the chimney job to be excellent. And throughout the project, Tim has maintained an excellent line of communication with me -- from keeping me informed about the dates, times, and costs; notifying me of any changes in schedules, and generally being available (or get back to me in a timely manner) to answer any questions I might have, and I appreciate that.

One final caveat that I am compelled to mention is the inherent uncertainty involved with weather-dependent repair projects. December to February in Vancouver is hardly the best time to work on these types of projects. Still, Tim and his crew made their best effort to plan their work around the weather, and help me get the repairs done as soon as the conditions allow. And when they were here, they wasted no time in making sure that the work goes right on schedule. I appreciate that.","Images":null,"When":""}]
